items.title: OpenClaw developers targeted in GitHub phishing scam offering fake token airdrops
items.summary: Security researchers said attackers are impersonating OpenClaw on GitHub, luring developers with bogus CLAW token giveaways that trick users into connecting their crypto wallets.

items.title: BPI sounds alarm on 'backdoor' for hardware wallets in Kentucky crypto bill
items.summary: Provisions in the state legislation violate the core ethos and value proposition of Bitcoin as an asset that can be held in self-custody, the trade group said.

items.title: Quantum risk real, but not all crypto wallets equally vulnerable: Galaxy
items.summary: Galaxy Digital’s Will Owens says most crypto wallets aren’t exposed to quantum risks, with vulnerabilities limited to cases where public keys are revealed.

items.title: Solana DApps revenue falls to 18-month low as SOL price risks $80 retest
items.summary: Weakening onchain activity and bearish derivatives data suggest that a SOL price recovery will take longer than most investors anticipate.

items.title: DeFi risk management giant Gauntlet sees $380 million exit as OKX crypto campaign ends
items.summary: Gauntlet noted that deposits are now back to same levels before the campaign, and has navigated large capital swings before due to incentive campaign endings, airdrops, and shifts in market conditions which regularly produce short-period swings in either direction.

items.title: Bitcoin $20,000 put option is third most popular strike ahead of quarterly expiry
items.summary: Nearly $600M in deep out-of-the-money puts highlights tail-risk positioning, though flows point more to volatility strategies than to outright bearish bets.

items.title: Coinbase removes legacy Commerce tool after seed phrase concerns
items.summary: Researchers raised alarms over a Coinbase-linked Commerce page that prompted wallet recovery phrase entry, which Coinbase said was part of a legacy product now being retired.

items.title: Bitcoin’s price action looks dangerously similar to the pattern that sent it crashing to $60,000
items.summary: The recent price action echoes the November–January pattern, showing weak conviction among the “buy the dip” crowd.

items.title: Bitcoin jumps to $70,800 as oil retreats; ether and XRP lag
items.summary: Oil prices slipped as major economies announced joint efforts to stabilize energy markets.

items.title: Morgan Stanley sets MSBT ticker and $1 million seed capital for bitcoin ETF
items.summary: Morgan Stanley has filed to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with the ticker MSBT and a $1 million seed at debut.

items.title: Super Micro co-founder arrested over alleged $2.5B AI chip smuggling scheme
items.summary: US authorities say they have charged and arrested Supermicro co-founder Yih-Shyan “Wally” Liaw for allegedly funnelling $2.5 billion in AI servers to China through shell companies.

items.title: Gemini sued over post-IPO strategy shift, declining stock price
items.summary: Crypto exchange Gemini is facing a proposed class-action lawsuit over what a complaint alleges is an “abrupt corporate pivot to a prediction-market-centric business model” after its IPO.

items.title: Appeals court denies Kalshi request to block Nevada enforcement action
items.summary: US gaming lawyer Daniel Wallach says a Nevada state court-issued restraining order against Kalshi appears imminent, preventing it from offering sports-related contracts.

items.title: Major gold trade group releases framework for tokenized gold
items.summary: The World Gold Council says it will develop a platform to connect physical gold to the systems used to issue and manage tokenized gold products.

items.title: Gemini shares surge 6% after hours on Q4 earnings
items.summary: Gemini reported its fourth quarter revenues were $60.3 million, which co-founders Cameron and Tyler Winklevoss say is its highest quarterly revenue in three years.

items.title: FBI warns fake FBI token on Tron is trying to scam users
items.summary: Scammers impersonating the FBI via a token are telling Tron users they are under investigation and must complete a check to avoid having their assets frozen.

items.title: Coinbase, Apex Group tokenize Bitcoin Yield Fund on Base
items.summary: Coinbase Asset Management’s Anthony Bassili says the Bitcoin Yield Fund’s tokenized share class checks “identity and eligibility at the token level” for compliance.

items.title: Execution quality is the missing metric in Bitcoin and Ethereum markets
items.summary: Crypto’s hidden trading costs demand the adoption of transaction cost analysis. Slippage, fees and fragmentation erode trust as crypto matures into institutional markets.

items.title: Crypto Clarity Act inches toward Senate hearing as lawmakers weigh legislative trades
items.summary: The White House may be reviewing fresh legislative text, and lawmakers are reportedly weighing offers to banks of other, unrelated provisions for their support.

items.title: Crypto markets – and the American people – deserve clarity
items.summary: The SEC is pivoting away from its previous regulatory strategy.
